Item.Text: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Device and failure type ODB coding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurrenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Item.Text: SC not activated for Precond Time 1
SC not activated for Precond Time 2
Delete Home Root and Contract Certificate
Link Re-Establishment after Amplitude Map Exchange
No direct or indirect EVSE found

Request.Name: ReadData.Time of Real Time Clock Read
WriteData.Time of Real Time Clock Write
Write SCC contract certificate chain Start
TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enables P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl,)

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests /Clip import: Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Test.Description: The on-board power supply voltage is too low. - ISO/SAE reserved
The on-board power supply voltage is too high. - ISO/SAE reserved
There is an internal control unit fault in the NVRAM memory. - general memory failure
The vehicle authenticity certificate was not found or is invalid. - data memory failure
The electricity contract certificate was not found or is invalid. - data memory failure
The signature of the data transmitted by the charging station is invalid. - value of signal protection calculation incorrect
The charging process was aborted by the charging station. - Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
The connection to the power supply unit could not be established. - erratic
The power supply unit does not support the protocol version of the Powerline Communications. - ISO/SAE reserved
The contactor of the charging station was not opened or closed. - performance or incorrect operation
The specified time until the start of the charging process was exceeded. - ISO/SAE reserved
The master certificate for communication with the power supply unit has an internal fault. - data memory failure
The charging station certificate is invalid. - invalid serial data received
Function ''Smart Charging'' is limited. - Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
Function ''Preconditioning'' is limited. - Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
The output for waking the vehicle has a malfunction. - General Electric Failure
The output for waking the vehicle has a malfunction. - circuit short to ground
The output for waking the vehicle has a malfunction. - circuit open
The output for emergency shutdown has a malfunction. - General Electric Failure
The output for emergency shutdown has a malfunction. - circuit short to ground
The output for emergency shutdown has a malfunction. - circuit open
The validity of the charging station certificate has not been confirmed by the certifying authority. - invalid serial data received
The certifying authority for the master certificate of the charging station certificate is unknown. - invalid serial data received
The secure connection was aborted by the charging station. - Bus Signal / Message Failures
The control unit has a malfunction. - System Internal Failures
The current vehicle identification number is incorrect or not present. - signal compare failure
The current vehicle identification number is incorrect or not present. - missing message
The control unit is not locked. - not activated
Communication with the drivetrain CAN bus has a malfunction. - General Electric Failure
Communication with the drivetrain CAN bus has a malfunction. - bus off
Communication with the drivetrain CAN bus has a malfunction. - erratic
Communication with the user interface CAN bus has a malfunction. - General Electric Failure
Communication with the user interface CAN bus has a malfunction. - bus off
Communication with the user interface CAN bus has a malfunction. - erratic
Communication with the electronic selector lever module has a malfunction. - missing message
Communication with control unit ''High-voltage battery'' has a malfunction. - signal invalid
Communication with control unit ''High-voltage battery'' has a malfunction. - missing message
Communication with control unit ''Drivetrain'' has a malfunction. - signal invalid
Communication with control unit ''Drivetrain'' has a malfunction. - missing message
Communication with the on-board charger has a malfunction. - signal invalid
Communication with the on-board charger has a malfunction. - missing message
Communication with the charging station has a malfunction - General Signal Failure
Communication with the charging station has a malfunction. - component internal failure
The real-time internal control unit clock has a malfunction. - parametric

Label.Text: Support SmartCharging Communication in nominal Control Pilot duty cycle
Precond will continue for this amount of time after departure time
Time needed before PLGW re authorize the charging process
Validation in case of EVSE found
Validation in case of EVSE potentially found
